name: Elbmesh Cross-Resource Direct Mutation
summary: A Resource, Action, or Reaction directly mutates another Resource instead of using Event-to-Action Reactions.

rules: Route cross-Resource behavior through Action -> Event -> Reaction -> Action.
checks: Review handlers and Reactions for writes to any Resource other than the Action target.
antiPatterns: A Reaction directly appends Events to its target Resource stream.
An Action handler loads or mutates another Resource as part of the same decision.

blocks.markdown: Direct cross-Resource mutation hides workflow edges from the manifest, weakens explainability, and bypasses Action execution, journals, and policy hooks.

blocks.description: Core rule: cross-Resource behavior happens through Workflows/Reactions.
Accepted Action -> Event -> Reaction -> Action model.
